prestazioni: Engine: Supercharged 5.4L Modular V8 (engine code: *BTR-4V Boss 290*), forged internals upgrade with Manley H-beam connecting rods, JE 9.5:1 forged pistons, and ARP main studs for 15 psi boost capability. Replace the stock Eaton M122 supercharger with a Harrop HTV2300 TVS supercharger (2.3L rotor volume) paired with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold by Alloy Fabrications Australia (AFA) for optimized airflow and reduced heat soak.

Forced Induction: Custom 3.5" intercooler core by PWR Performance (Australia) with dual 102mm throttle bodies and a custom heat exchanger setup using a Setrab 45-row oil cooler for transmission and differential cooling. Upgrade to a custom 3" stainless steel exhaust system by Manta Exhausts with 304-grade mandrel-bent piping, twin 3.5" outlets, and a Valvetronic electronic cutout for switchable aggression.

Drivetrain & Handling: Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission swap with a twin-disc clutch setup by Spec Clutches (Stage 3+ with billet flywheel) and a Quaife ATB differential (3.73:1 final drive). Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for Falcon chassis), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyurethane bushings by SuperPro (full chassis refresh). Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers with 380mm rotors and 4-piston rear calipers with 355mm rotors, paired with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads.
estetica: Aero: Custom widebody conversion using FPV GT-F-inspired flares by ADR Performance (Australia), fabricated from carbon fiber with integrated cooling ducts for brakes and intercooler. Front splitter by ADR with adjustable canards, and a custom carbon fiber rear diffuser by Carbon Revolution. Roof replacement with a carbon fiber panel by Carbonworks to reduce weight and lower center of gravity.

Exterior: Full respray in Ford Performance Blue with a matte clear coat by House of Kolor. FPV GT-F-style LED taillights by Diode Dynamics, and custom HID projector headlights with a Morimoto XB35 HID kit (5500K). Side markers replaced with sequential LED units by Oracle Lighting, and a custom front grille delete with a mesh insert by Tickford Racing (FPV heritage).

Interior: Full Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs) with custom Alcantara upholstery by Katzkin, featuring FPV GT-F embroidery. Custom roll cage by Autopower (Australia) with bolt-in design and integrated harness bars for 6-point Schroth harnesses. Dash overlay in carbon fiber by V Carbon, and a custom gauge pod by Defi (Japan) housing a 3-gauge setup (boost, oil pressure, fuel pressure) with a digital AFR gauge by AEM.
